blended.narrative: Mt. Bachelor is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 14 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,722 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 13" of heavy snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 14".
